subcodes.first_line: O child of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received and its contents noted. Praise be to God that thou art firm and steadfast and art striving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابن ملکوت نامه شما رسید و مضمون معلوم گردید الحمد لله که ثابتی و نابت و ساعی
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts
